html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: The Forge

The Forge Portal is a Structure exclusive to The Forge event. It serves as an enemy spawner that generates the rounds in the challenge. Forge Portals cannot be blocked or destroyed by the players.

Trivia

  • The Forge Portal's spawn code is "lavaarena_spawner". However, it's not possible to spawn it in the regular game, while the Console is not available at all on The Forge servers.

“This is where those enemies are coming from.”
–Wilson
“Jerks come out of it.”
–Willow
“Little circle! Give me many things to fight!”
–Wolfgang
“That's where they come from...”
–Wendy
“IT'S AN ENEMY MANUFACTURER”
–WX-78
“It seems to facilitate local teleportation.”
–Wickerbottom
“Better keep an eye on that.”
–Woodie
“It's a one-way portal.”
–Maxwell
“Tis möst heinöus magic!”
–Wigfrid
“That's the bad guy portal!”
–Webber
“That's where our foes keep coming from!”
–Warly
“Makes the bad guys”
–Wormwood
“Wonder how it works?”
–Winona
“Short range hoppery!”
–Wortox
“Fighty folk keep coming from there.”
–Wurt
“This is where those enemies are coming from.”
–Walter
“This is where those enemies are coming from.”
–Wanda
The Forge Portal is a Structure exclusive to The Forge event. It serves as an enemy spawner that generates the rounds in the challenge. Forge Portals cannot be blocked or destroyed by the players.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Forge Portal's spawn code is "lavaarena_spawner". However, it's not possible to spawn it in the regular game, while the Console is not available at all on The Forge servers.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cổng Lò rèn là một Cấu trúc dành riêng cho sự kiện The Forge. Nó đóng vai trò là kẻ sinh sản của kẻ thù tạo ra các vòng trong thử thách. Người chơi không thể chặn hoặc phá hủy Cổng Forge.
